chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. D- 758 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 15.07.2025 For orders on office objections For orders on MA 3382/25 For hearing of main case Mr. Muhammad Anwar Sangi, Advocate for Petitioner Mr. Irfan Ali Talpur, D.P.G. After advancing certain primary submissions, learned counsel for the Petitioner does not press this Petition on merits and submits that he would be satisfied if direction is issued to the trial court for expeditious conclusion of the trial. Learned D.P.G does not oppose the request and submits that final challan has been presented before the trial court and that the matter is now fixed for framing of the charge; therefore, he submits that the period of two months would suffice in that regard. As such, while dismissing this Petition we hereby direct the trial court to proceed with the trial so as to conclude the same without undue delay, preferably within the aforementioned time frame. JUDGE JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
